name: Development feature: reusable event templates
description: Save a custom event template, apply it to a new event, verify the populated values, save the event, and clean it up.

planSteps.description: Type demo@timeora.app into the email field
Type TimeoraDemo123! into the password field
Click the Sign In button and wait for the dashboard to load
Click + Add Event once to open a new event dialog
Type TS Reusable Focus Template into the title field, set duration to 45 minutes, and select Focus in the Kategori field
Verify the template action changes to Saved!
Click Batal to close the unsaved event dialog
Click + Add Event once to open a fresh event dialog
Click the exact Quick Template button named TS Reusable Focus Template
Verify the title is TS Reusable Focus Template, duration is 45 minutes, and Kategori is Focus
Click Simpan Event and wait for the calendar to refresh
Verify an event block containing TS Reusable Focus Template appears on the calendar
Click the TS Reusable Focus Template event, click Hapus, and confirm the browser deletion prompt
Verify the deleted-event undo banner appears, confirming cleanup
